title: MendingControl
body:
## Mending Control

MendingControl is a lightweight and effective Minecraft server plugin designed to restrict how players obtain the Mending spell.

By default, players can acquire Mending books or items through fishing, villager trading, and loot chests found in generated structures.

This plugin gives server administrators full control over Mending acquisition to help maintain server balance and economy.


## Features
- Prevents villagers from offering Mending books through trading
  
- Prevents Mending books and items from appearing in loot chests (e.g., dungeons, bastions, rare cities)
  
- Encourages exploration and rewards effort by ensuring Mending is only obtained through fishing
  
- Plug and play: no configuration required
  
- Ideal for servers with survival and economy systems

## Screenshot

**If a villager has a mending spell book or item in their possession, the code will detect it and display it as such on your screen.**

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb491a8ccd9f8600772f9e2eacb2efa08d47f0f6_0.webp)
